name: Grilled Shrimp with Bacon
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell and devein the uncooked shrimp.
2. In a bowl, mix together lemon juice, catsup, hot pepper sauce, garlic, and oil.
3. Marinate the shrimp in the mixture for 30 minutes to 1 hour at room temperature.
4. Cut bacon into thirds or halves and wrap it around each shrimp.
5. Thread the wrapped shrimp onto skewers.
6. Grill until the bacon is crisp, about 10 to 12 minutes. Turn the shrimp several times and brush with reserved marinade.
7. Bacon dripping may cause flare-ups on the grill; keep a water spritzer handy.
8. Serve immediately with lemon wedges.
